title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird, founder of Koah Labs (an ad monetization platform for AI tools), discusses his decision-making framework from competitive sailing and explains why ads rather than subscriptions are the sustainable monetization model for AI applications. He argues the primary bottleneck for AI agents is human trust adoption, not technical capability.
